message:
feat(wasm-abi): ergonomic API facade with builders, outcome helpers, and diagnostics (asupersync-umelq.9.3)

Add high-level ergonomic API layer that reduces ceremony while keeping
lifecycle/cancellation semantics fully explicit:

- WasmScopeEnterBuilder, WasmTaskSpawnBuilder, WasmFetchBuilder — fluent
  builder patterns for request construction
- WasmOutcomeExt trait — pattern-match helpers (is_ok/is_err/is_cancelled/
  is_panicked, ok_value, err_failure, cancellation, outcome_kind)
- Convenience methods on WasmExportDispatcher: create_scoped_runtime,
  spawn, spawn_and_join, close_scoped_runtime
- WasmDispatcherDiagnostics — snapshot with is_clean(), as_log_fields()
  for structured observability and leak detection

11 new tests covering builder patterns, outcome inspection, convenience
lifecycle methods, diagnostics, and mixed-outcome scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,9 +54,11 @@ pub use wasm_abi::{
     WasmAbiPayloadShape, WasmAbiRecoverability, WasmAbiSignature, WasmAbiSymbol, WasmAbiValue,

     WasmAbortPropagationMode, WasmBoundaryEventLog, WasmBoundaryState, WasmBoundaryTransitionError,
-    WasmDispatchError, WasmExportDispatcher, WasmExportResult, WasmFetchRequest, WasmHandleKind,
-    WasmHandleRef, WasmScopeEnterRequest, WasmTaskCancelRequest, WasmTaskSpawnRequest,
-    apply_abort_signal_event, apply_runtime_cancel_phase_event, classify_wasm_abi_compatibility,
-    is_valid_wasm_boundary_transition, required_wasm_abi_bump, validate_wasm_boundary_transition,
-    wasm_abi_signature_fingerprint, wasm_boundary_state_for_cancel_phase,
+    WasmDispatchError, WasmDispatcherDiagnostics, WasmExportDispatcher, WasmExportResult,
+    WasmFetchBuilder, WasmFetchRequest, WasmHandleKind, WasmHandleRef, WasmOutcomeExt,
+    WasmScopeEnterBuilder, WasmScopeEnterRequest, WasmTaskCancelRequest, WasmTaskSpawnBuilder,
+    WasmTaskSpawnRequest, apply_abort_signal_event, apply_runtime_cancel_phase_event,
+    classify_wasm_abi_compatibility, is_valid_wasm_boundary_transition, required_wasm_abi_bump,
+    validate_wasm_boundary_transition, wasm_abi_signature_fingerprint,
+    wasm_boundary_state_for_cancel_phase,
 };
